profile.title: Senior Freelance Frontend Engineer
profile.summary: Senior freelance frontend developer with 10+ years of experience building large-scale web applications and digital platforms for enterprise, public-sector, and agency clients. Specialized in React, Next.js, Vue, TypeScript, frontend architecture, accessibility, and performance optimization.

freelance.availability: Available for freelance projects and long-term collaborations

projectSupplements.details: Freelance engagement via Scholz & Volkmer GmbH for Deutsche Bahn (March 2024 – February 2026). Software used by service staff to inform travelers about train connections, delays, and related updates. Christian implemented Vue-based components, performed bug-fixing, and integrated APIs. Also built with TypeScript across desktop, mobile, customer displays, and dedicated hardware terminals.

Freelance engagement via Scholz & Volkmer GmbH (June 2025 – September 2025). German Federal Ministry of Education and Research (BMBF) initiative focused on environment and sustainability. Developed a Vue/Nuxt web app combined with physical sensors as a toolkit for citizens without formal academic training. Christian led initial frontend setup and visualized sensor data from a Directus backend on maps using MapTiler and Leaflet.
React, TypeScript, and TanStack Query management platform for monitoring production equipment and scheduling maintenance in a large-scale dairy manufacturing environment.
Built scalable React frontend components and AEM templates for BMW's corporate platform.
Led frontend architecture on Liferay, delivering reusable portal components in close collaboration with design and backend teams.
Frontend lead for the mobile web launch experience. Led the swipeable mobile version of an HTML scrollpage with fullscreen imagery and device-independent usage.
Contributed to the official McDonald's Germany iOS application. The app reached more than 2 million downloads and ranked among the top 15 most downloaded iPhone apps in Germany in 2012.
Led frontend development for national campaigns including Do-Your-Own-Coupons, Mexify Yourself, Blend-in-Cup, and Big Mac Hunt.

campaignsAndProducts.name: McDonald's Schmecktakel 2013
campaignsAndProducts.details: Campaign allowing customers to enter a code redeemable for a free streamed film, audiobook, or voucher from participating partners.

campaignsAndProducts.name: Do-Your-Own-Coupons (DYOC)
campaignsAndProducts.details: Frontend lead for a configurator web app that let users combine products into coupons redeemable in restaurants nationwide, implemented for both the McDonald's portal and app.

campaignsAndProducts.name: Hyundai Guess Santa's Song
campaignsAndProducts.details: Interactive web application supporting a Hyundai marketing campaign.

campaignsAndProducts.name: Hyundai Asphalt 7 Training
campaignsAndProducts.details: Interactive training application supporting the Hyundai Asphalt 7 social media campaign.

campaignsAndProducts.name: Sharaf Online Shop
campaignsAndProducts.details: Shopware-based e-commerce platform for a leading electronics retailer in the UAE.

clientEngagements.note: Christian was freelancing for Scholz & Volkmer throughout this period. A reference letter issued in September 2024 only covers the initial six months (March – August 2024). He continued on further freelance projects with them after the reference was created, including SensEm in 2025, through February 2026.

employerReferences.author: Katharina Grujic
employerReferences.engagementClarification: The reference letter reflects the first six months of a longer freelance engagement. Christian continued working as a freelance Senior Developer for Scholz & Volkmer after the reference was issued.
employerReferences.employerDescription: Owner-operated creative agency for digital brand management, based in Wiesbaden, Germany.
projectHighlights: Deutsche Bahn: Vue components, API integration, and bug-fixing on traveler information software for service staff.
SensEm (BMBF): Initial frontend setup and map-based visualization of sensor data from Directus using MapTiler and Leaflet.
strengthsNoted: Technical expertise, creativity, and strong work ethic
Effective collaboration with designers, project managers, and developers
Attention to detail and commitment to high-quality delivery
Proactive identification of issues early in development
Reliable delivery on time and within budget
Rated very highly for specialist knowledge, perceptiveness, motivation, reliability, work ethic, ability to work under pressure, and social behavior
employerReferences.recommendation: Highly recommended as a Senior Web Developer who would be a valuable asset to any organization. Scholz & Volkmer would gladly work with Christian again.
